question.content: For the beam decomposed into p_0, R_D, and M_D subproblems, solve the right-end vertical reaction R_D using end displacement and rotation compatibility. Output exactly one expression token sequence in plain ASCII only, no Chinese characters, no unit text, no sentence, no equality sign, no chained equalities, and no extra text. Answer format: a single algebraic expression for the target quantity. Use the variable names from the problem and ASCII characters only; do not include units, explanatory text, or an equals sign.

step_1.content: Use the slope-deflection and fixed-end-actions route, not the three-subproblem displacement superposition route.
step_1.key_point: Impose fixed-end rotations directly: θ_A=0 and θ_D=0.

step_3.content: Evaluate the fixed-end moments generated by the left-half UDL and assign end-moment directions at A and D.
step_3.key_point: Use M_A^F and M_D^F from the loaded-span fixed-end action set.

step_5.content: Recover end shears from the end moments and distributed-load resultant using member equilibrium.
step_5.key_point: Apply V_A+V_D=p_0L/2 together with the right-end moment balance.

step_7.content: Solve the two equilibrium relations for the shear pair and read the right-end reaction with sign convention.
step_7.key_point: Identify R_D as the right-end shear value.
